message:
refactor(fwc): remove blocking_workflow_availability gate in favor of execution-time truth surfacing

Removes the pre-execution blocking gate that prevented capsule/task
advancement when compiled workflow truth was non-success. The gate was
overly conservative — it blocked execution before any attempt, whereas
the execution-time failure path already surfaces the availability tag
through execution_failure_truth() and execution_failure_capsule_status().

workflow.rs (-38 lines):
- Removed blocking_workflow_availability() function entirely
- ready_for_execution(): no longer checks blocking availability
- derive_capsule_status(): falls through to execution-time status
  derivation instead of short-circuiting on availability tag
- build_task_next_actions(): removed "do not advance or run" guidance
  block; lets the normal action suggestion flow handle it

main.rs:
- Removed --offline from "gudie" typo test (gudie is not a subcommand
  that accepts --offline)
- Added debug output for DO simulation payload inspection

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
